events.title: State Cabinet approval of ₹79.67 crore rejuvenation grant
events.note: State Cabinet approved an additional ₹79.67 crore to resume desilting and rejuvenation works at main inlets and wetlands (Iblur, HAL) after funding delays.

events.title: Legislative Committee Inspection and Restoration Mandate
events.note: The legislative standing committee on Local Bodies inspected Varthur Lake, expressing concern over slow progress and ordering BDA to expedite boundary fencing and desilting before takeover.

events.title: NDMF Rejuvenation and Flood Mitigation Fund Allocation
events.note: Under the National Disaster Mitigation Fund (NDMF), the government allocated ₹20 crore for Hebbal Lake's rejuvenation to increase storage capacity, desilt the wetland, and mitigate Outer Ring Road flooding.

events.title: NDMF Rejuvenation and Desilting Fund Allocation
events.note: Earmarked NDMF funds for Halsur (Ulsoor) Lake rejuvenation, covering desilting, sediment trap repair, and kalyani restoration.

events.title: BBMP Gabion Wall Construction and Erosion Control Project
events.note: BBMP proposed and commenced the construction of gabion structures to address soil erosion and prevent encroachments, sparking citizen protests over ecological concerns.
